calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Michael Hawk.

Mr. Melbostad stated that he filed a supplemental declaration on November 6th addressing the points raised by the Probate Examiner, that there is nothing further on the assets, and that the beneficiary designation was rejected because Mr. Tyler signed it before he signed the Trust and it was not signed within 90-days before the date the Trust was signed. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Continued To Nov-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
